Package neqsim.process.chemistry.rca

Class RootCauseCandidate

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.rca.RootCauseCandidate
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class RootCauseCandidate extends Object implements Serializable
A candidate root cause produced by RootCauseAnalyser.

Each candidate carries a code, a human-readable description, the supporting evidence chain, a normalised score (0..1) and a tag indicating whether it is the PRIMARY cause, a CONTRIBUTING factor, or merely POSSIBLE.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • RootCauseCandidate

      public RootCauseCandidate(String code, String description, double score, String evidence, String recommendation)
      Builds a candidate.
      Parameters:
      code - stable machine-readable code
      description - plain-language description
      score - normalised 0..1 score
      evidence - narrative evidence chain
      recommendation - suggested mitigation
